title: Data Dictionary for allegheny_dog_licenses.csv
description:
This dataset provides a comprehensive registry of dog licenses, encompassing 50,013 individual records. It details pet characteristics such as breed and color alongside administrative information like license types, effective dates, and owner zip codes. The data serves to document pet ownership and valid licensing periods across various categories of lifetime and senior registrations.

### Notable Characteristics

* **Sentinel Values:** The `ExpYear` field consists entirely of the value `2099`, which serves as a sentinel indicating no expiration.
* **PII/Sensitive Data:** The dataset contains Personally Identifiable Information (PII) in the form of `DogName` and geographic identifiers via `OwnerZip`.
* **High Cardinality:** The `DogName` and `Breed` fields exhibit high cardinality, indicating a wide variety of unique values across the dataset.
* **Distribution Patterns:** The `LicenseType` field shows a concentration in lifetime registrations, particularly for spayed females and neutered males.
* **Data Quality:** The dataset is highly complete with very low null counts across all fields; however, the `Breed` and `Color` fields contain minor sparsity.
* **Temporal Range:** The `ValidDate` field shows a temporal span of approximately 23 years, from 2003 to 2026.

OwnerZip.title: Owner Zip Code
OwnerZip.description: The postal zip code of the dog's owner; component of the owner's mailing address.

ExpYear.title: License Expiration Year
ExpYear.description: The year the license is scheduled to expire. Part of the license validity period; when combined with ValidDate, defines the coverage range. A value of 2099 is a sentinel for no expiration.

ValidDate.title: License Effective Date
ValidDate.description: The date and time the license was issued or became valid; represents the start of the license's validity period.
